title: Radiant Barrier Manufacturing | Turnkey Energy Insulation
reasonForSelling: Owner is retiring after decades of successful operations.
supportTraining: Owner will provide full transition support and training for up to 30 days to ensure smooth operations. Additional consulting available upon request to assist with vendor relationships, client transition, and product knowledge.
description:
Established in 1987, Innovative Insulation is a premier manufacturer of radiant barrier and energy-efficient insulation products with national distribution and global brand recognition. Operating from a 23,000 sq. ft. facility in Arlington, Texas, the company produces proprietary insulation materials used across residential, commercial, and industrial applications.

With over $1 million in equipment and infrastructure—including two radiant barrier production machines, forklifts, trade show assets, and 17 storage containers—this turnkey operation is fully equipped for scale. The brand’s domain and trade names are among the most recognized in the radiant barrier industry, offering strong market credibility and organic demand.

Positioned for significant growth, Innovative Insulation provides a strong foundation for expansion into retail, e-commerce, and international channels. Ideal acquisition for private equity or strategic buyers in manufacturing, energy efficiency, or building materials sectors seeking a well-established platform with recurring revenue and exceptional scalability.

Ad#:2431770
